title: Malaysian-Style Stir Fried Sweet Plantains
description: Sweet plantains stir fried with a hint of Malaysian flair, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Malaysian stir-fry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the sweet plantains and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3-4 minutes or until they start to soften.
Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes or until the plantains are tender and the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt, sugar, and lime juice to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
